zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Sywardby於1422年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親William Sywardby27歲，母親Elizabeth Vavasour19歲。她於1441年與Geoffrey Pigot IV在英國越可爾利朋結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年12月26日在英國越可爾約克享年63歲，埋葬在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Sywardby于1422年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲William Sywardby27岁，母亲Elizabeth Vavasour19岁。她于1441年与Geoffrey Pigot IV在英国越可爾利朋结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1485年12月26日在英国越可爾約克享年63岁，埋葬在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Sywardby was born in 1422, in Yorkshire, England, her father, William Sywardby, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth Vavasour, was 19. She married Geoffrey Pigot IV in 1441, in Ripon, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 26 December 1485, in York, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Sywardby est née en 1422, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Sywardby, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Vavasour, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffrey Pigot IV en 1441, à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 décembre 1485, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Sywardby 1422 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Sywardby 27 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Vavasour 19. Sie hat 1441 in Ripon, Yorkshire, England Geoffrey Pigot IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Dezember 1485 im Alter von 63 Jahren in York, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Yorkshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Sywardbyが1422年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Sywardbyは27歳，母Elizabeth Vavasourは19歳であった。1441年にイギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンでGeoffrey Pigot IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1485年12月26日にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで63歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Sywardby(이)가 1422년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Sywardby(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Vavasour(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1441년 영국 요르크실르 리폰에서 Geoffrey Pigot IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 12월 26일 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Sywardby nasceu em 1422, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Sywardby, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Vavasour, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey Pigot IV em 1441, em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de dezembro de 1485, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Sywardby родилась в 1422 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Sywardby было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Vavasour, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey Pigot IV в 1441 г. в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 26 декабря 1485 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности еркшир, Англия.

Murió el 26 de diciembre de 1485, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
